diagrams.title: Exception Priority Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows fixed vs configurable priorities with negative values for faults and 0-15 for configurable
diagrams.purpose: Understand priority numbering and masking scope

diagrams.title: NVIC Interrupt Flow
diagrams.description: Complete flow from interrupt request to handler execution and return
diagrams.purpose: Learn complete interrupt handling sequence in Cortex-M

diagrams.title: Tail Chaining vs Normal Exit
diagrams.description: Comparison showing optimized tail chaining path vs traditional exit-enter sequence
diagrams.purpose: Visualize performance optimization in exception handling

diagrams.title: Priority Grouping Split
diagrams.description: Shows how 4 priority bits are divided into group (preemption) and subpriority fields
